title: Swinney Open to Considering Ban on US Military Aircraft at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Potential Ban on Military Aircraft
sections.content: John Swinney stated that he would contemplate restricting the operations of US military planes at Prestwick Airport. This consideration arises if it is confirmed that these aircraft are involved in certain undisclosed activities.

sections.heading: Context of the Statement
sections.content: The comments from the First Minister reflect ongoing discussions surrounding military operations at civilian airports in Scotland, with a focus on compliance with local and national regulations.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Swinney would 'consider' US military plane ban from Prestwick Airport
